steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. According to the first equation in the given system, $y=4$. Substituting $4$ for $y$ in the second equation in the given system yields $x=4+6$, or $x=10$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $y$, not $x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
